title: Chosen-one frame
html:
Stub. The self-positioning Yahir uses when pressure-converts-to-spotlight: "I must be the chosen one, the one that takes risks, shit doesn't work out, it doesn't matter — it's a part of the journey, because ultimately things do work out, and better than you could have ever envisioned" (2025 02 12 thoughts and things 2122024). Trust-stack: god-as-backstop, self-as-primary. Sibling of magnetic aura and manifesto register.

Connections: manifesto style note · magnetic aura · mom house by the river goal · 2024 12 14 departing china
